name: jira
description: Jira + XRay integration — issues, sprints, boards, test cases, executions, and results

env.JIRA_PAT: Jira Personal Access Token (Server) or API Token (Cloud)
env.JIRA_EMAIL: Atlassian account email (required for Cloud, optional for Server)
env.JIRA_CUSTOM_FIELDS: Comma-separated custom field names or IDs to include in responses
env.XRAY_CLOUD_CLIENT_ID: XRay Cloud API Key client ID (https://xray.cloud.getxray.app)
env.XRAY_CLOUD_CLIENT_SECRET: XRay Cloud API Key client secret
